message:
feat: SSH config MatchCriteriaContext refactor, SFTP improvements, mux/tmux updates

ssh/config.rs: Extract MatchCriteriaContext struct to replace
individual parameter threading through match evaluation.  Exec
matcher callback now receives context for token expansion.

ssh/filewrap.rs: File wrapper improvements.
ssh/sessioninner.rs: Session inner refinements.
ssh/sftpwrap.rs: SFTP wrapper enhancements.
ssh/tests/e2e/sftp: SFTP E2E test updates.

mux/domain.rs, ssh.rs, termwiztermtab.rs, tmux.rs: Mux and tmux
integration adjustments.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
